name: @kmos/crawl-station-app
description: CrawlStation — the KMOS ecosystem's acquisition front-end. Paste a URL, watch a live, transparent crawl, and leave with searchable, trustworthy knowledge: every page preserved as evidence with a content hash, readable content derived with lineage, each page a KnowledgeObject with explainable trust — all durable in KMOS. A thin product over the KMOS platform substrate (CSTN-01).
